positions.detail: Down -99% — stop loss triggered at -50%. Close position.
Down -99% — stop loss triggered at -50%. Close position.

agent_analysis:
## ELEVATED — Thursday Position Monitor

### Portfolio Status: CRITICAL DAMAGE

| Position | Stock | Option P&L | Status | Assessment |
|----------|-------|-----------|--------|------------|
| **DDOG CALL** | -12.0% | **-99%** | 🔴 STOP_HIT | Dead. Delta ≈ 0.00. Should have been closed at -50%. |
| **F CALL** | -9.5% | **-99%** | 🔴 STOP_HIT | Dead. Delta ≈ 0.00. Should have been closed at -50%. |
| **SMCI CALL** | -1.2% | **-37%** | 🟡 WARNING | Alive but deteriorating. Charm is destroying this overnight. |

---

### Analysis

**DDOG & F:** Both blew through the -50% hard stop and went to zero. At -99% these are worthless — delta is effectively 0.00 (delta stop triggered simultaneously). There is nothing to recover. The 12% and 9.5% stock moves against calls with ~0.35 entry delta made these binary losses. These should have been exited when they hit -50%.

**SMCI:** At -37% on Thursday with only 1.2% stock decline, this tells me charm decay did most of the damage — the stock barely moved but the option lost over a third of its value. With 1 day to expiry:
- Estimated delta has drifted well below 0.20 (from ~0.35 entry)
- Thursday theta burn is ~4%+/day, accelerating into Friday
- Thursday target is only 15% — this position needs a **+54% move from here** just to reach the day-specific target. Impossible without a massive gap.
- Recovery math: even a 2% SMCI rally tomorrow likely only recovers 5-10 points on a crushed-delta option
- At -37%, it's past the -30% warning zone and approaching the -50% hard stop with overnight charm acceleration virtually guaranteed to push it there

**Ensemble check:** All three positions were calls. Without market data I can't confirm regime, but 3/3 calls moving against us with stock declines of 1-12% suggests either the directional model misfired this week or a regime shift occurred post-entry. The all-call portfolio with no contrarian swap (methodology requires swap if avg confidence < 0.75) should be reviewed in reflection.

---

### RECOMMENDATION

**Close all three positions NOW.**

DDOG and F are formalities — they're at zero. Execute market orders to clear them off the book.

**SMCI is the only real decision, and the answer is EXIT.** At -37% on Thursday with charm-crushed delta, there is no realistic path to profit. Holding overnight guarantees further theta/charm erosion of 4-5%+ into a Friday where you'd need a gap-up miracle. Salvage the remaining ~63 cents on the dollar rather than watch it bleed to the -50% stop or expire worthless.

**Portfolio P&L this week: approximately -78%. Zero winners. Flag for deep-dive in weekly reflection — three calls, all losers, two hit stop, pattern suggests directional model failure or missed regime shift.**
